description: This file implements an in-memory repository for managing documents and their extracted text, including functions for creating, listing, retrieving, and updating documents and text data, primarily used as a temporary persistence layer before integrating with a database.

methods.name: createDocument
methods.description: Creates a new document record in memory with provided input data and generates a unique ID.

methods.name: listDocuments
methods.description: Returns a list of documents in memory, ordered by creation date descending, with optional pagination.

methods.name: getDocumentById
methods.description: Fetches a document by its ID, returns null if not found.

methods.name: upsertExtractedText
methods.description: Appends extracted text data for a specific document, maintaining insert-only semantics.

methods.name: getLatestExtractedText
methods.description: Retrieves the most recent extracted text for a given document.

methods.name: getLatestDocumentForUserByCategory
methods.description: Gets the newest document for a user and category, ordered by creation date.
